paragraphs: Fermi Inc's stock price is currently 6.12, with a 1.16 percent increase from the prior close and a 31.77 percent decrease over the last 20 trading sessions. The company has seen one new news item in the last 24 hours.
The recent news item announced that Fermi Inc will host its second quarter 2026 earnings call on August 13, 2026. This news was reported by FinanzNachrichten.de on July 20, 2026.

There have been several recent SEC filings, including a SCHEDULE 13G and multiple 8-K forms, which include announcements of the issuance of convertible senior notes and the resignation of a director. Additionally, there has been one Form 4 filing, indicating insider activity, and 18 proxy solicitation filings.
